title: Uruguayan Beef Pie
description: A traditional Uruguayan dish that combines the flavors of beef and pastry. Perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: Pie Crust
ingredients.amount: 1 pre-made crust or ingredients for homemade

instructions: In a pan, cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Roll out the pie crust and place it in a 9-inch pie dish.
Fill the pie crust with the beef mixture and top with shredded cheese.
If using, sprinkle crispy bacon bits on top of the cheese.
Bake the pie in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
